/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -pie --coverage -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/euxis-gateway-cpp_tests.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/euxis-gateway-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_config.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-gateway-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_auth.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-gateway-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_server.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-gateway-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_routes.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-gateway-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_mcp.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-gateway-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_websocket.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-gateway-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_state.cpp.o" -o euxis-gateway-cpp_tests  libeuxis-gateway-cpp.a /usr/lib/libgtest_main.so.1.17.0 ../euxis-security-cpp/libeuxis-security-cpp.a ../euxis-core-cpp/libeuxis-core-cpp.a ../euxis-crypto-cpp/libeuxis-crypto-cpp.a ../euxis-adapters-cpp/libeuxis-adapters-cpp.a ../euxis-metrics-cpp/libeuxis-metrics-cpp.a /usr/lib/libbrotlicommon.so /usr/lib/libbrotlienc.so /usr/lib/libbrotlidec.so /usr/lib/libz.so /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so ../_deps/ixwebsocket-build/libixwebsocket.a /usr/lib/libz.so /usr/lib/libsodium.so /usr/lib/libspdlog.so.1.17.0 /usr/lib/libfmt.so.12.1.0 /usr/lib/libgtest.so.1.17.0
